summary: Successfully tested SquashRank Pro match auto-results feature. All features working correctly: auto-creation of tournament results from match creation (Final=1st/2nd, Semi Final=1st/3rd), last_match with score_formatted in rankings and player details, tournament history with automatic labels (Champion, Runner-up, Semi Finalist), score formatting with set results.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auto-result features working: 1) POST /api/matches auto-creates results with placement based on round (Final winner=1st/loser=2nd, Semi Final loser=3rd), 2) GET /api/rankings returns last_match with score_formatted for players with matches, 3) GET /api/players/{id}/details returns last_match and match_history, 4) Frontend Rankings page shows Last Match in top player cards, 5) Player modal shows 'Última Partida' and 'Histórico de Torneios' with Champion/Runner-up labels, 6) TournamentDetails shows formatted score with set result. Ranking calculation unchanged - uses configured points table (1st=100, 2nd=75, 3rd=50, etc). Test admin: admin/admin123.
features_verified: POST /api/matches - auto-creates results for winner (placement from round) and loser
Final match: Winner gets placement=1, Loser gets placement=2
Semi Final match: Loser gets placement=3
GET /api/rankings - returns last_match with score_formatted for each player
Rankings page - Top player cards show 'Last Match' section with opponent and formatted score
Player modal - Shows 'Última Partida' section with detailed match info
Player modal - Shows 'Histórico de Torneios' table with Champion/Runner-up/Semi Finalist labels
TournamentDetails - Matches tab shows score formatted as '11-5, 11-4, 11-2 (3-0)'
Ranking calculation - Points table unchanged (1st=100, 2nd=75, 3rd=50, etc)
Admin login and match management - Working correctly
screenshots_captured: 02_rankings_page.png - Rankings page with top 5 players cards
03_player_modal.png - Player modal showing Última Partida and Histórico de Torneios
